step_rationale: Lymphatic growth factor; post-MI recovery factor, not atherothrombotic-cascade mechanism.
mechanism: VEGF-C promotes cardiac lymphatic regeneration and recovery after MI but does not directly participate in plaque destabilization or acute thrombosis.

references.title: Functions and Regeneration of Mature Cardiac Lymphatic Vessels in Atherosclerosis, Myocardial Infarction, and Heart Failure.
